tasks.label: cargo check rshtml
tasks.command: cargo check 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Output '=== BUILD SUCCESS ===' } else { Write-Output '=== BUILD FAILED ===' }

tasks.label: cargo build rshtml
tasks.command: cargo build 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Output '=== BUILD SUCCESS ===' } else { Write-Output '=== BUILD FAILED ===' }

tasks.label: cargo check rshtml
tasks.command: cargo check 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Output '=== CHECK SUCCESS ===' } else { Write-Output '=== CHECK FAILED ===' }

tasks.label: cargo build rshtml
tasks.command: cargo build 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Output 'BUILD SUCCESS' } else { Write-Output 'BUILD FAILED' }

tasks.label: git add and commit
tasks.command: git add .vscode/tasks.json; git diff --cached --name-only; echo "---"; git log --oneline -3

tasks.label: git commit
tasks.command:
git commit -m "feat(serial,ui): 新增串口命令调试工具 + 优化 sweep 数据稳定性

- 新增 Serial 面板串口调试工具（端口枚举/连接/收发/WebSocket 实时日志）
- 新增 src/serial_port.rs 串口管理模块
- 新增 /api/serial/ports, /api/serial/connect, /api/serial/disconnect, /ws/serial 路由
- 消除 cargo build 全部 warning
- 修复 AP FSP 订阅失败 WARN 日志刷屏 → 降为 DEBUG + suppress_sdk_console_output
- 修复切换 Active Device 后 sweep 数据卡顿（退避 continue 跳过数据采集）
- 修复切换设备后 FSP 不再重新初始化问题
- Serial 面板深色终端风格 CSS

Signed-off-by: xiaojian <jian.xiao@artosyn.cn>"

tasks.label: git commit single line
tasks.command: git commit -m "feat(serial,sweep): add serial debug console, fix sweep data stutter after device switch, suppress FSP warn noise"
